How it works Examples Login

Place Yourself
On The Map

Generate a stunning stylized map portrait of any city in the world — with you in it. 100% free. No sign-up needed.

✓ Free    ✓ No signup    ✓ Download in seconds

Tokyo
Japan
London
United Kingdom
How It Works

Three steps to your portrait

Step 01

Choose Your City

Type any city name in the world. We'll find it instantly using OpenStreetMap data.

Step 02

Upload Your Photo

Upload any photo of yourself. Optionally remove the background for a cleaner composite.

Step 03

Download Your Portrait

Get a high-quality 900×1200px image ready to share or print. Instantly.

Examples

See what people create

Tokyo
Japan
Tokyo, Japan
London
United Kingdom

United States

France
Paris, France

Your portrait will look like this — with YOUR photo and YOUR city.

Features

Everything you need

Any City in the World

From Tokyo to Colombo, we support every city on Earth using OpenStreetMap data.

Beautiful Map Style

Dark navy with gold roads — an artistic style that makes every city look stunning.

Smart Photo Placement

Your photo composited directly onto the map. With or without background removal.

Instant Generation

Your portrait is ready in seconds, composited entirely in your browser.

High Resolution Download

Download at 900×1200px — perfect for sharing on social media or printing.

Completely Free

No account, no payment, no catch. Just create and download instantly.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Yes, completely free. No hidden fees, no subscription, no credit card needed. Create and download as many portraits as you like.
Any clear photo works. For best results, use a photo where you're standing against a plain or simple background. Portrait orientation works best.
Yes! We support any city, town, or place in the world using free OpenStreetMap data and Nominatim geocoding. If it's on the map, you can use it.
Your portrait downloads at 900×1200 pixels, which is perfect for social media sharing or standard printing at up to 4×5 inches.
Yes! On the photo step you can choose to remove the background. This creates a clean cutout that floats over the map — it works best with a plain background in the original photo.

Ready to see yourself on the map?

Takes less than 60 seconds. No sign-up needed.

Add yourself to the map

Upload a photo of yourself. Works best with a clear, front-facing photo.

or click to browse files

With Background

Your photo placed as-is on the map

RECOMMENDED

Your cutout floats cleanly over the map
